test-method.name: verifyBannerIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify banner/carousel is visible

test-method.name: verifyDealsAreVisible
test-method.description: Verify Today's Deals section is visible

test-method.name: verifyFooterIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify footer is present

test-method.name: verifyHomePageLoads
test-method.description: Verify homepage loads successfully

test-method.name: verifyLoginButtonIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify login button is visible

test-method.name: verifyLogoClickRedirectsToHomePage
test-method.description: Verify Flipkart logo click redirects to homepage

test-method.name: verifyLogoIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify Flipkart logo is visible

test-method.name: verifyNavCategoriesAreDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify top navigation categories are displayed

test-method.name: verifyPageTitle
test-method.description: Verify page title is correct

test-method.name: verifySearchBarIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify search bar is present

test-method.name: verifyClickingProductNavigates
test-method.description: Click first product and verify navigation

test-method.name: verifyConsistentResults
test-method.description: Search same keyword twice — consistent results

test-method.name: verifyPricesDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify prices shown in search results

test-method.name: verifyResultCountIsGreaterThanZero
test-method.description: Verify search result count is greater than 0

test-method.name: verifySearchSuggestionsAppear
test-method.description: Verify search suggestions appear while typing

test-method.name: verifySearchUsingEnterKey
test-method.description: Search using Enter key

test-method.name: verifySearchWithInvalidKeyword
test-method.description: Search invalid keyword and verify no results

test-method.name: verifySearchWithNumbers
test-method.description: Search with numbers only

test-method.name: verifySearchWithSpaces
test-method.description: Search with spaces and verify results

test-method.name: verifySearchWithSpecialCharacters
test-method.description: Search with special characters

test-method.name: verifySearchWithValidKeyword
test-method.description: Search valid product and verify results load

test-method.name: verifyUrlContainsKeyword
test-method.description: Verify URL updates with search keyword

test-method.name: verifyBrandFilterApplied
test-method.description: Apply brand filter and verify results

test-method.name: verifyClearAllFilters
test-method.description: Clear all filters and verify reset

test-method.name: verifyClickProductOpensDetailPage
test-method.description: Click product opens detail page

test-method.name: verifyMultipleFiltersApplied
test-method.description: Apply multiple filters simultaneously

test-method.name: verifyNextPage
test-method.description: Go to next page and verify products

test-method.name: verifyPagination
test-method.description: Verify pagination works

test-method.name: verifyPriceFilterApplied
test-method.description: Apply price filter and verify results

test-method.name: verifyPricesDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify product prices are displayed

test-method.name: verifyProductImagesLoaded
test-method.description: Verify product images are loaded

test-method.name: verifyProductsDisplay
test-method.description: Verify products display on listing page

test-method.name: verifyRatingFilterApplied
test-method.description: Apply rating filter and verify results

test-method.name: verifySortByHighToLow
test-method.description: Sort by Price High to Low

test-method.name: verifySortByLowToHigh
test-method.description: Sort by Price Low to High

test-method.name: verifySortByNewestFirst
test-method.description: Sort by Newest First

test-method.name: verifySortByPopularity
test-method.description: Sort by Popularity

test-method.name: verifyAddToCartButtonPresent
test-method.description: Verify Add to Cart button is present

test-method.name: verifyBuyNowButtonPresent
test-method.description: Verify Buy Now button is present

test-method.name: verifyDeliveryInfoDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify delivery info is displayed

test-method.name: verifyMrpDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify MRP and discount are shown

test-method.name: verifyOffersDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify offers section is displayed

test-method.name: verifyProductImagesDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify product images are displayed

test-method.name: verifyProductPageLoaded
test-method.description: Verify product detail page loads

test-method.name: verifyProductPriceDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify product price is displayed

test-method.name: verifyProductTitleDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify product title is displayed

test-method.name: verifyRatingDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify product rating is displayed

test-method.name: verifySellerInfoDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify seller info is displayed

test-method.name: verifySimilarProductsDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify similar products section loads

test-method.name: verifySpecificationsDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify specifications are displayed

test-method.name: verifyThumbnailClick
test-method.description: Verify thumbnail click changes main image

test-method.name: verifyUrlContainsProductId
test-method.description: Verify URL contains product identifier

test-method.name: verifyBackNavigationFromCart
test-method.description: Verify back navigation works from cart

test-method.name: verifyCartAccessibleFromSearch
test-method.description: Verify cart accessible from search page

test-method.name: verifyCartIconClickNavigates
test-method.description: Verify cart icon click navigates to cart

test-method.name: verifyCartIconVisible
test-method.description: Verify cart icon is visible in header

test-method.name: verifyCartPageLoadTime
test-method.description: Verify cart page loads within 5 seconds

test-method.name: verifyCartPageLoads
test-method.description: Verify cart page loads successfully

test-method.name: verifyCartPageRefresh
test-method.description: Verify cart page persists after refresh

test-method.name: verifyCartPageTitle
test-method.description: Verify cart page has correct title

test-method.name: verifyCartUrl
test-method.description: Verify cart page URL is correct

test-method.name: verifyContinueShoppingButton
test-method.description: Verify Continue Shopping button is visible

test-method.name: verifyContinueShoppingNavigates
test-method.description: Verify Continue Shopping navigates to homepage

test-method.name: verifyEmptyCartMessage
test-method.description: Verify empty cart message displayed

test-method.name: verifyHomeToCartNavigation
test-method.description: Verify navigation from homepage to cart

test-method.name: verifyLoginPromptOnCart
test-method.description: Verify login prompt shown on cart page

test-method.name: verifyPricesOnCart
test-method.description: Verify prices are displayed on cart page
